name: agent-plugin-core
description: A production-oriented Codex plugin foundation for exposing application state, semantic actions, native widgets, and agent operating skills.

interface.shortDescription: Turn an application into a native, agent-operable Codex plugin.
interface.longDescription: Agent Plugin Core provides a native MCP App widget, semantic action registry, versioned project state, atomic batch operations, audit events, and operator/integrator skills so Codex can safely automate an application instead of clicking an opaque UI.
defaultPrompt: Open the connected application and summarize its current state.
Plan and execute this workflow in the connected application, then verify the result.
Help me expose my application's actions and state to Codex.
